profile.name: Ivo Frazão
profile.tagline: Platform Software Engineer – Architecture, Security & Cloud

companies.name: Fidelidade
companies.description: Portugal's largest insurance provider. Working on backend services and shared platform components used across multiple lines of business and development teams.

roles.title: Platform Software Engineer
roles.summary: Building backend services and reusable platform components adopted across multiple lines of business. Work spans security models, authentication flows, simulation engines, caching, and observability.

projects.title: Deep-Linking Security Model
projects.tagline: Identified a user-level gap in the platform's deep-linking security model. App-to-app isolation was already in place — what was missing was a check that the user opening a deeplink was the user it was created for. Because teams were using deeplink context as an SSO substitute (passing usernames to authenticate on arrival without a password), the missing check was a user impersonation path. Added bearer token validation as a second security layer alongside the existing app-level key mechanism. The service has ~20 integrations in production; the new model is in active rollout.
projects.hook: App-to-app isolation was already in place. What was missing was simpler and more dangerous: no check that the user opening a deeplink was the user it was created for. Because the custom IdP had no SSO, teams were passing usernames in context and authenticating on arrival without a password — which meant the missing check was a user impersonation path. I added bearer token validation as a second layer alongside the existing app key to close it.

projects.title: Custom Identity Provider Migration
projects.tagline: Extended OAuth2/OIDC authentication flows in the platform's custom identity provider, aligning with Microsoft Entra External ID. Currently used by 15 development teams in production.

projects.title: Insurance Simulation Platform
projects.tagline: Reusable screens, blocks and services for multi-step insurance simulation flows pulled independently by each line of business. Includes in-memory search and cached components reducing external API calls.

projects.title: Platform Observability
projects.tagline: Introduced structured logging and metrics across the platform where none previously existed. Surfaced call volume and version distribution for the deep-linking service — a question previously unanswerable — directly informing consumer migration timelines. Enabled identification of unused settings, making a cleanup process possible for the first time.

companies.name: Deloitte
companies.description: Global consulting and technology services firm. Nearly seven years growing through the engineering track, from first implementation work to technical ownership of backend behaviour across multiple simultaneous client projects.

roles.title: Tech Analyst
roles.summary: First-year software engineer delivering across mobile, web, and back-office enterprise applications in the consulting track.

projects.title: Employee Marketing Communications Mobile App
projects.tagline: Internal mobile application for employee communications and event management — iOS and Android via OutSystems and Cordova. Push notifications, event calendars, automatic event check-in, employee directory. Backend integrated with LDAP for authentication.

projects.title: Invoice Matching System
projects.tagline: Two-week POC modernising a Lotus Notes legacy invoice matching system for a major retail chain — three-stage matching process (invoices, purchase orders, delivery receipts) with bulk import and manual matching, replacing an Excel-by-email workflow. The POC directly triggered a year-long follow-on engagement with a dedicated team building 10+ further applications.

projects.title: Social Support Programme Platform
projects.tagline: Public-sector digital platform supporting application management workflows for a Social Support Programme. On-location international project for a GCC public-sector client.

roles.title: Tech Consultant
roles.summary: Mid-level delivery across healthcare, construction, and industrial sectors. Started owning complete features end-to-end and introduced DevOps practices to the delivery team.

projects.title: Healthcare Web & Mobile App
projects.tagline: Web and mobile platform for patient interactions with hospitals and clinics: appointment scheduling, medical records, telemedicine, Bluetooth-based facility navigation. SOAP integrations with hospital backend systems. Took on client management responsibilities during tech lead absence.

projects.title: Construction Site Management App
projects.tagline: Tablet application for equipment and budget management across construction sites, integrated with SAP for real-time project data. The client's SAP APIs had no JOIN support and required column meaning to be reverse-engineered from observation. Designed and implemented a multi-step async sync engine with a state machine, controlled resume/retry logic, and chunked processing for large tables.

projects.title: DevOps Deployment Pipeline
projects.tagline: Designed an automated deployment pipeline (Jenkins, OutSystems LifeTime, BDD, Selenium, JMeter, SonarQube) as a strategic consulting showcase. Presented to prospective clients; contributed directly to winning a major factory management contract.

roles.title: Tech Senior Consultant
roles.summary: First role as tech lead and team lead. Drove architecture decisions, led cross-functional teams, and grew from owning a single module to overseeing a full production platform.

projects.title: Workflow Builder Platform
projects.tagline: No-code workflow builder for an energy sector client — dynamic form generation, event-driven execution, and retry logic enabling non-technical teams to design and run their own operational workflows without engineering involvement. Improved user interactions by 40% in key processes at rollout, with up to 70% expected as more processes migrate.
projects.hook: My most technically ambitious project: a configurable workflow platform built as a composition of modular monoliths — field catalogue with dependency chains, rule engine, dynamic form generation, and event-driven workflow activities. Led a cross-functional team of 12.

projects.title: Telecom B2B Self-Management Portal
projects.tagline: B2B self-management portal for a telecom client. The primary challenge was not technical: the client engaged in irregular bursts requiring active momentum management throughout. Achieved 30% improvement in key processes.

projects.title: OutSystems Training Programme
projects.tagline: Delivered a comprehensive training programme for 12+ participants, achieving a 90% certification success rate.

roles.title: Tech Experienced Senior Consultant
roles.summary: Technical ownership across multiple client projects simultaneously — full platform delivery, backend architecture, SQL optimisation, infrastructure right-sizing, and mentoring senior developers.

projects.title: Point-of-Sale Platform
projects.tagline: Delivered a B2C+B2B point-of-sale platform under a 6-month deadline driven by a company merger. Reverse-engineered a legacy ERP with no API documentation to enable integration, maintaining live operations across all subsequent releases. Operated as sole engineer for a sustained phase — making integration, design, and stakeholder decisions independently. Rolled out and trained 20 stores.
projects.hook: 6-month deadline, a legacy ERP with no API documentation, and a company merger to accommodate. For a sustained phase I was the only engineer — redesigning flows end-to-end as ERP assumptions broke, running steering committee meetings, and keeping live ops running.

projects.title: Public Sector Energy Bidding & Contracting Platform
projects.tagline: Architecture specialist for a national-scale energy procurement platform covering all public sector buying in the country. Designed a dynamic data model for variable lot combinations — preventing a high-maintenance static implementation. Produced the first C4 architecture model the consulting team presented to a client.

projects.title: Infrastructure & SQL Optimisation
projects.tagline: Designated infrastructure and SQL lead across the low code consulting practice. On taking ownership, resolved a year-long critical deployment pipeline failure that had blocked team governance and delivery. Established platform governance from scratch — enforced team application ownership, replaced free-for-all visibility with team-scoped access, defined responsibilities, and eliminated orphaned applications — reducing the factory by ~20% in application objects. Brought the platform current — executing a multi-version catch-up from a 2020 release to 2024 — and established a yearly upgrade cadence where none had existed. Eliminated all query timeouts on a budget management module (SQL Server) by redesigning lazy-loaded data access stages. Right-sized Mendix RAM allocations achieving 50% cost reduction on peak-burst scaling. Defined dynamic uptime schedules for dev/UAT environments during a cloud lift-and-shift, eliminating idle infrastructure costs.

education.institution: Instituto Superior Técnico – University of Lisbon

education.degree: Master of Engineering — Electrical and Computer Engineering
highlights: Top 3% best student award, received every year of the degree
Dissertation: "Applying Machine Learning Techniques on the Detection of Cyber-Physical Attacks" — Grade 19/20
Publication: CRITIS 2018 — "Denial of Service Attacks: Detecting the frailties of ML algorithms in the Classification Process"
Student leadership: Pedagogical Council, Engineering Student Union (Coordinator, Secretary, Treasurer), Bot Olympics General Coordinator
